---
title: "getting-started"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{getting-started}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>"
)
```

# Introduction

This vignette demonstrates the typical workflow for working with INMET data using **climateBR**.

The workflow consists of three steps:

1. Download the raw data.
2. Build a partitioned Arrow dataset.
3. Read and analyze the processed dataset.

## Download data

```{r eval=FALSE}
download_inmet(
  years = 2000:2005,
  unzip_to = "~/Downloads/inmet"
)
```

## Build the dataset

```{r eval=FALSE}
build_inmet_dataset(
  input = "~/Downloads/inmet",
  output = "~/inmet"
)
```

## Read the dataset

```{r eval=FALSE}
rainfall <- read_inmet(
  path = "~/inmet",
  years = 2000,
  collect = FALSE
)
```
